'''Zonnos Anjiliac Priare''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] of the [[Anjiliac]] [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidic]]. He was framed for the murder of his father, [[Popara Anjiliac Diresto]], by his brother, [[Mika Anjiliac Chiera]], the real murderer.

{{Char-stub}}
